task_completion.description: Navigate to the Call Time Holidays section in Vicidial.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screenshot shows the Vicidial administration interface with the 'Call Time Holidays' section or listing open.

task_completion.description: Create Q1 holidays: New Years Day, Martin Luther King Jr Day, and Presidents Day.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The holiday list shows entries for 'newyears2025' (2025-01-01), 'mlk2025' (2025-01-20), and 'presidents2025' (2025-02-17) with the status 'ACTIVE'.

task_completion.visual_evidence: The holiday list shows entries for 'memorial2025' (2025-05-26) and 'juneteenth2025' (2025-06-19) with the status 'ACTIVE'.

task_completion.visual_evidence: The holiday list shows entries for 'july4th2025' (2025-07-04) and 'labor2025' (2025-09-01) with the status 'ACTIVE'.

task_completion.description: Create Q4 holidays: Columbus Day, Veterans Day, Thanksgiving, and Christmas Day.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The holiday list shows entries for 'columbus2025' (2025-10-13), 'veterans2025' (2025-11-11), 'thanksgiving2025' (2025-11-27), and 'christmas2025' (2025-12-25) with the status 'ACTIVE'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Vicidial web GUI to create the holidays.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Vicidial system.
